allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import django; django.setup\(\) if False else None; from django.core.management import call_command; call_command\('check'\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; $g = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { Write-Output "git at: $\($g.Source\)" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) - $\($p.ProcessName\)" } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on port 3000" })

PowerShell(& "C:\\Users\\tedwi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\kpi-system\\backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" "C:\\Users\\tedwi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\kpi-system\\backend\\manage.py" shell -c "from auth_app.models import MagicLink; from django.utils import timezone; print\('NOW', timezone.now\(\)\); [print\(m.token[:12], 'used=',m.is_used, 'exp=',m.expires_at, 'valid=',m.is_valid\(\)\) for m in MagicLink.objects.all\(\)[:5]]")
